content.problemStatement:
Given an array AAA of length NNN, you have to perform QQQ queries on it.

There are three different type of queries:


111 LLL RRR - For every iii such that L‚Č§i‚Č§RL \le i \le RL‚Č§i‚Č§R and Ai>0A_i \gt 0Ai‚Äč>0, replace AiA_iAi‚Äč with AiA_iAi‚Äč ‚ą£|‚ą£ (Ai‚ąí1)(A_i-1)(Ai‚Äč‚ąí1).
222 LLL RRR - For every iii such that L‚Č§i‚Č§RL \le i \le RL‚Č§i‚Č§R and Ai>0A_i \gt 0Ai‚Äč>0, replace AiA_iAi‚Äč with AiA_iAi‚Äč &\&& (Ai‚ąí1)(A_i-1)(Ai‚Äč‚ąí1).
333 xxx - Print AxA_xAx‚Äč.
Output the answer to each query of type 333.


Input Format

The first line contains 222 integers, NNN and QQQ - the number of elements in the array AAA and the number of queries, respectively.
The next line contains NNN integers - A1A_1A1‚Äč, A2A_2A2‚Äč, ‚Ä¶\ldots‚Ä¶, ANA_NAN‚Äč, the elements of the array AAA.
iii-th line of the next QQQ lines contains the description of the iii-th query.


Output Format
For each query of type 333, output the value of AxA_xAx‚Äč.
constraints: For queries of type 111 and 222, 1‚Č§L‚Č§R‚Č§N1 \le L \le R \le N1‚Č§L‚Č§R‚Č§N
For queries of type 333, 1‚Č§x‚Č§N1 \le x \le N1‚Č§x‚Č§N
